summary: Created the US-842 QA test design at docs/test-design/us-842-rule-phases.md with executable phase scenarios for bidding, all-pass, contract ordering, widow pickup, discard, whist, half-whist, pass, trick play, misere, deal settlement, next deal, and bullet completion. The document makes the fixed Sochi profile explicit, traces scenarios to REQ-1755/1756/1757 and AC-2422/2423, defines legal-action generation expectations, and includes shared trick/all-pass/misere fixtures plus handoff notes for MZ-202 and MZ-204.

tests_run.command: rg -n "^(# US-842 Rule Phases QA Test Design|## Fixed Agreement Profile Assumptions|## Scenario Matrix|## Legal Action Generation Scenarios Per Phase|## Transition Scenarios|## Trick-Winner Fixtures|## All-Pass And Misere Fixtures|## Regression And NFR Notes|## Implementation Handoff Notes)" docs/test-design/us-842-rule-phases.md
tests_run.details: Confirmed the required sections exist in the authored QA test design.
Existing project tests passed without changes required by this documentation task.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Design artifact only; implementation evidence belongs to MZ-202/MZ-204.
